title: Canvas Quick Start / 画布快速入门

detail.en: Click a note or text node and drag it around.
detail.zh: 点击提示贴或文本节点，并试着拖动。

detail.en: Keep a node selected and check the right inspector.
detail.zh: 保持选中节点，在右侧检查参数。

detail.en: Text nodes can feed prompt ports.
detail.zh: Text 节点可以接入 prompt 接口。

detail.en: Starter canvases live in the template library.
detail.zh: 新手模板都在模板库中。

detail.en: Use it to inspect progress and recent outputs.
detail.zh: 用它查看进度和最近结果。

groups.title: 2. Nodes And Ports / 节点与接口
3. Run And Inspect / 运行与检查

nodes.title: Welcome / 欢迎
nodes.text: This starter canvas is safe to edit. Select any node, drag it around, then inspect its settings on the right. / 这个入门画布可以放心编辑。选中任意节点、拖动它，然后在右侧 Inspector 查看设置。

nodes.title: Template Library / 模板库
nodes.text: Use the top Template Library button to create guided starter projects. / 用顶部“模板库”按钮创建引导模板。

nodes.title: Nodes And Ports / 节点与接口
nodes.text: Nodes are tools or media. Drag from an output port to a matching input port to build a chain. Port colors show media, text, config, and generation links. / 节点代表工具或素材。从输出接口拖到匹配输入接口即可搭建链路。

nodes.title: Example Text Node / 示例文本节点

text.value: a cozy studio desk, warm light, organized creative tools / 温暖灯光下的创作书桌，整齐的工具与素材

nodes.title: Run Queue / 运行队列
nodes.text: When you run a preset chain, the top Run Queue widget shows active tasks, progress, failed runs, and recent results. / 运行 preset 链路时，顶部运行队列控件会显示任务与进度。

nodes.title: Inspector
nodes.text: The right Inspector exposes full node details. Collapse it when you need space; hover the edge handle to bring it back. / 右侧 Inspector 展示节点完整参数。需要空间时可以折叠。
